title: medicago × media var. versicolor
intro: Medicago × media var. versicolor, also known as Versicolor Medicago or Alfalfa, is a variety of the legume plant species, belonging to the pea family and is a natural hybrid between Medicago sativa and Medicago falcata. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Medicago × media var. versicolor include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve overall cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used as a natural remedy for a range of health issues.
